_meta.attribution: FDA Orange Book: Approved Drug Products with Therapeutic Equivalence Evaluations (public domain).
_meta.note: Descriptive US regulatory-landscape context only, not regulatory advice. Single-ingredient products only. supply: generic = a live ANDA lists this active ingredient (off-patent in basic form); brand_patented = single-source brand with an unexpired Orange Book patent (expiry in latest_patent_expiry); brand_only = single-source brand, no unexpired patent; discontinued; combination_only = only present inside combo products; not_listed = absent from the Orange Book (biologics, supplements, and non-US-approved drugs will not appear).
